meta.summary: Ultra-fast sequence search, clustering, and taxonomy workflows for protein and nucleotide datasets.
meta.description: Ultra-fast sequence search, clustering, and taxonomy workflows for protein and nucleotide datasets.

test: mmseqs version | grep -Fx '8cc5ce367b5638c4306c2d7cfc652dd099a4643f' >/dev/null
mmseqs 2>&1 | grep -F 'MMseqs2 Version: 8cc5ce367b5638c4306c2d7cfc652dd099a4643f' >/dev/null
mmseqs easy-search 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: mmseqs easy-search' >/dev/null
mmseqs createdb 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: mmseqs createdb' >/dev/null
mmseqs databases 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: mmseqs databases' >/dev/null
for module in easy-taxonomy fwbw pairaln taxonomyreport createdmptaxonomy; do mmseqs "$module" 2>&1 | grep -F "usage: mmseqs $module" >/dev/null || exit 1; done
bash -lc 'printf ok' | grep -Fx ok >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mmseqs2-createdb && cd /tmp/taf-mmseqs2-createdb && printf '>s1\nMKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN\n' > seqs.fa && gzip -c seqs.fa > seqs.fa.gz && bzip2 -c seqs.fa > seqs.fa.bz2 && mmseqs createdb seqs.fa.gz seqdb --threads 1 >/tmp/taf-mmseqs2-createdb.log 2>&1 && test -s seqdb && test -s seqdb.index && mmseqs createdb seqs.fa.bz2 seqdb_bz --threads 1 >/tmp/taf-mmseqs2-createdb-bz.log 2>&1 && test -s seqdb_bz && test -s seqdb_bz.index

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mmseqs2-search && cd /tmp/taf-mmseqs2-search && printf '>q1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
' > query.fa && printf '>t1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
>t2
GILGFVFTLTVPSERKELKQLLQK
' > target.fa && mmseqs easy-search query.fa target.fa result.m8 tmp --threads 1 -s 1.0 >/tmp/taf-mmseqs2-easy-search.log 2>&1 && test -s result.m8 && grep -F 'q1' result.m8 >/dev/null && grep -F 't1' result.m8 >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mmseqs2-cluster && cd /tmp/taf-mmseqs2-cluster && printf '>s1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
>s2
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
>s3
GILGFVFTLTVPSERKELKQLLQK
' > seqs.fa && mmseqs easy-cluster seqs.fa cluster tmp --threads 1 --min-seq-id 0.9 -c 0.8 >/tmp/taf-mmseqs2-cluster.log 2>&1 && test -s cluster_cluster.tsv && grep -F 's1' cluster_cluster.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 's2' cluster_cluster.tsv >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mmseqs2-lin-rbh && cd /tmp/taf-mmseqs2-lin-rbh && printf '>q1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
>q2
GILGFVFTLTVPSERKELKQLLQK
' > query.fa && printf '>t1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
>t2
GILGFVFTLTVPSERKELKQLLQK
>t3
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
' > target.fa && mmseqs easy-linclust target.fa lin tmp-lin --threads 1 --min-seq-id 0.9 -c 0.8 >/tmp/taf-mmseqs2-linclust.log 2>&1 && test -s lin_cluster.tsv && mmseqs easy-rbh query.fa target.fa rbh.m8 tmp-rbh --threads 1 -s 1.0 >/tmp/taf-mmseqs2-rbh.log 2>&1 && test -s rbh.m8 && grep -F 'q1' rbh.m8 >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mmseqs2-db-workflow && cd /tmp/taf-mmseqs2-db-workflow && printf '>q1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
>q2
GILGFVFTLTVPSERKELKQLLQK
' > query.fa && printf '>t1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
>t2
GILGFVFTLTVPSERKELKQLLQK
>t3
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
' > target.fa && mmseqs createdb query.fa queryDB --threads 1 >/tmp/taf-mmseqs2-createdb-query.log 2>&1 && mmseqs createdb target.fa targetDB --threads 1 >/tmp/taf-mmseqs2-createdb-target.log 2>&1 && mmseqs search queryDB targetDB resultDB tmp-search --threads 1 -s 1.0 >/tmp/taf-mmseqs2-search-db.log 2>&1 && mmseqs convertalis queryDB targetDB resultDB result.m8 >/tmp/taf-mmseqs2-convertalis.log 2>&1 && test -s result.m8 && grep -F 'q1' result.m8 >/dev/null && mmseqs createtsv queryDB targetDB resultDB result.tsv >/tmp/taf-mmseqs2-createtsv.log 2>&1 && test -s result.tsv && mmseqs convert2fasta targetDB target.back.fa >/tmp/taf-mmseqs2-convert2fasta.log 2>&1 && test -s target.back.fa && grep -F '>t1' target.back.fa >/dev/null
